introduction: Best friends Parker, Bailey, and Simone are reuniting for another girl's trip, in New York City. Parker will be making her Fashion Week debut while Bailey and Simone are tagging along to live their best tourist lives. When Parker loses her lead model in the show, Simone eagerly volunteers to step in. Now, with Simone modeling for the show, Bailey as her self-proclaimed accountant, and her assistant, Johnny, helping her pull out all the stops, Parker is optimistic that the show will be a huge success. But, after getting into an altercation with another fashion designer, Parker is pinned as the prime suspect when the designer goes missing and is presumed dead. As things continue to go awry in the days leading up to the show, the three friends find themselves constantly squabbling and losing hope. Will the women be able to reconcile before they fall into the trap that is being set for them? More importantly, will they ever learn that staycations can be just as fun and 95% less dangerous?
